policy_issue: Fiscal reform bill reallocating subsidies from legacy districts to youth housing and transit
party_order: Oppose the bill publicly until district guarantees are added.
faction_order: Use the vote to force a rewrite rather than accept symbolic amendments.
district_pressure: Local supporters want visible funds for transit and small business relief.
media_pressure: National media frames the persona as reckless if he blocks the budget.
player_instruction: Push for a bolder amendment, but avoid collapsing the coalition.
recent_memory: The player previously backed a procedural delay but failed to warn him before speaking to the press.
